author: Billy Banks (aka Billy Tucker-Robinson), Sovereign Founder
purpose: Define sovereign rules of accounting, treasury management, and financial transparency across all currency phases of PulseWorld — from simulation to fiat to crypto — ensuring lineage-logged, auditable, and self-governing finance.

ledger_types.purpose: Tracks training rewards, sinks, and skill scores
Logs real-world revenue, treasury splits, and readiness
Records minting, vesting, burns, liquidity, and governance

governance.judiciary: Resolves disputes, enforces rollback, audits fraud
governance.autopilot: Monitors ledger health, triggers buybacks, enforces inflation caps

safeguards.anti_fraud_clause: No minting or transfer without proof
safeguards.audit_rituals: Monthly and quarterly reviews logged in Senate Journal

autonomous_treasury: Fiat treasury governed by business throughput
PulseCoin emissions tied to GDP and governance votes
